# SPARQL POST with application/sparql-query body
endpoint: sparql_query
classification: spec-required
match_mode: structural-json
description: POST /sparql with application/sparql-query body returns JSON

=== request
POST /sparql
Content-Type: application/sparql-query
Accept: application/sparql-results+json

SELECT * WHERE { ?s ?p ?o } LIMIT 0

=== response
200
Content-Type: application/sparql-results+json

{"head":{"vars":[]},"results":{"bindings":[]}}
